title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
